---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve ntelioUI2
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open example page '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include console errors if any.

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11)
- **ntelioUI2 version:** (e.g., 2.0.0)

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (related issues, workarounds tried, etc.).
